question: Which region is the city Kabul located in?
gold_sql: SELECT Region FROM country AS T1 JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Name  =  "Kabul"
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.regi FROM city AS T1 JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.coun = T2.code WHERE T1.nm = 'Kabul';
raw_response: SELECT T2.regi FROM city AS T1 JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.coun = T2.code WHERE T1.nm = 'Kabul';
